message:
Here's something wild: your dog's nose is as unique as your fingerprint. 🐾

Every pup has a one-of-a-kind pattern of ridges and bumps on their nose — no two are exactly alike, not even identical-looking littermates. Some kennel clubs have even used nose prints as a way to identify dogs.

So the next time your dog boops you, remember: that's a signature no other dog on earth can copy. ❤️

Give your pup a little nose kiss from us today. 🐶
